sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50385" key="i)lli/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰλλ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n50385.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">look askance, leer</tr_>, glossed by <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">διανεύω</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
